subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, that the Call may draw him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم الی الذی اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم لیجذبه الندآء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
